.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(15, 9, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(22, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(87, 165, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(15, 9, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(87, 165, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(29, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #30363d 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#30363d, color-mix(in srgb, #30363d 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #30363d 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#30363d, color-mix(in srgb, #30363d 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(29, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(29, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(224, 222, 113, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(126, 231, 135, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(177, 186, 196, 0.12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(29, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(177, 186, 196, 0.12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(15, 9, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(15, 9, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(87, 165, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(29, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(15, 9, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(87, 165, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(29, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(1, 4, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(22, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(22, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(22, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(15, 9, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
